arts.ttl: Marseille manager Roberto De Zerbi defends Ligue 1 and criticizes LFP for its lack of exposure
arts.sum: Olympique de Marseille manager Roberto De Zerbi has defended Ligue 1 and criticized LFP – Ligue de Football Professionnel, the league’s governing body – for their inability to promote it…

arts.ttl: Preview: Marseille vs. Le Havre - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Marseille and Le Havre, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
